Welcome to SharronDavies.com

Women's Sports Union UK

A not-for-profit organisation of like-minded people passionate about fair and safe sport for women and girls.
Women’s Sports Union UK

Sharron Davies Training

Train anytime, anywhere for just 4×15 mins a week, all levels of ability with Sharron from her own home.
Sharron Davies Training

Unfair Play

A book Sharron’s extremely proud of, explaining the challenges to women’s sport over the decades & today, using common sense, facts & the peer reviewed science. Shortlisted for the prestigious William Hill sports book of the year.
Amazon: Buy Now

Squid Go

Fast, drug-free relief from muscle soreness, joint pain, and swelling. Ideal for arthritis, sports recovery, injuries, and post-surgery.

Squid Go

Arthosamid

A ground breaking new injection that’s Sharron’s had that can relieve osteoarthritis knee pain, stopping that vicious circle of inactivity & anti inflammatories.

Arthosamid

Get in touch

Whether you want to ask a question, book her for an interview, wish to work with her – why not contact Sharron Davies MBE?
